name: Enrich company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API for your team for Routing (04776)

parameters.content:
### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 2 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Read Pending Queue (Google Sheets)

### Read Pending Queue (Google Sheets)

googleSheets — `read` operation against the connected account.

Next: Work in Batches

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Work in Batches

Loop controller — releases 5 item(s) per pass. Output 2 (loop) processes the batch, output 1 (done) fires after the last batch.

Ports: ①→ Aggregate Batch Results · ②→ Process Batch Item

### Process Batch Item

POST https://api.example.com/v1/leads — retries 3× with backoff on failure.

Next: Respect Rate Limits

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 API key / bearer for the target API

### Respect Rate Limits

Pauses 2 seconds — spacing calls to respect rate limits.

Next: Work in Batches

### Aggregate Batch Results

Collapses all items into a single summary item (for counts and run stats).

Next: Mark Completed in HubSpot

### Mark Completed in HubSpot

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

# Enrich company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API for your team for Routing (04776)

**Pattern:** Data Enrichment · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Enrich company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API for your team for Routing (04776). It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual routing is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Read Pending Queue (Google Sheets) → Work in Batches → Aggregate Batch Results → Mark Completed in HubSpot

## Use it for
- Teams that want to data enrichment without manual effort
- Anyone automating routing in sales
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Responds in seconds
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Standardizes the process every time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; Google OAuth2 / service account; HubSpot private-app token.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## ⏱ Rate limiting

Work is batched and spaced with Wait so provider quotas aren't tripped. If you hit 429s, lower the batch size or raise the wait — throughput drops, reliability rises.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your routing process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
